error[E0277]: `*const ()` cannot be shared between threads safely
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/deepseek-v3.2/expressions/cond_op_1/sample_001/target.rs:3:14
  |
3 | static C_VP: *const () = ptr::null();
  |              ^^^^^^^^^ `*const ()` cannot be shared between threads safely
  |
  = help: the trait `Sync` is not implemented for `*const ()`
  = note: shared static variables must have a type that implements `Sync`
